ed.title: Provisional Directive to the First Draft of the Constitution

content.p: This is effective until revision one of the Constitution is ratified. Before formal revision of the Constitution, changes to the Constitution shall be made via Executive Directives (EDs); such EDs shall pose time limit for time until formal changes to the Constitution; for those EDs, reference to this ED shall be made. When changes are made, reference to the Constitution must also consider the changes made through those EDs.
